rationale: Gov't Code §2306.071 governs fund management for the housing finance division. It is unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount and creates no conflict.
quote: The department may request, contract for, receive, and spend for its purposes an appropriation, grant, allocation, subsidy, rent supplement, guarantee, aid, contribution, gift, service, labor, or material from this state, the federal government, or another public or private source.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and housing finance division fund management provisions.
